figures.caption: Figure 1: Approximation ratio as a function of problem size N for QAOA (gold circles) and Simulated Annealing (orange squares).
Figure 2: Wall-clock runtime versus problem size N . QAOA exhibits lower runtimes compared to Simulated Annealing for all tested N .
Figure 3: Estimated energy consumption as a function of N . QAOA (gold) remains in the picojoule regime, while Simulated Annealing (orange) rises into nanojoules.
